objective: Replace repeated menswear placeholders with purpose-built photography that matches each commerce slot.

art_direction.mood: quiet luxury, premium menswear, modern West African corporate confidence
art_direction.lighting: soft daylight or controlled studio light with deep, clean contrast
constraints: no logos or text inside images

preview_set.prompt: Photoreal menswear hero: Black male model in rich cocoa double-breasted suit, premium outdoor architecture background, calm negative space, high-end editorial, no logos, no text.
Photoreal category image for premium suits: clean full-body frame, strong tailoring silhouette, deep navy palette, luxury retail campaign look.
Photoreal category image for luxury dress shirts: crisp ivory shirt with subtle jacket layering, clean collar detail, premium catalog style.
Photoreal category image for tailored trousers: lower-body emphasis with sharp crease and polished shoes, neutral upscale interior backdrop.
Photoreal category image for silk ties: close crop of tie knot and lapel in premium suit fabric, refined texture, luxury editorial close-up.
Photoreal category image for mens accessories: cufflinks, pocket square, belt detail on tailored jacket, premium styling, minimal background.
Photoreal office menswear scene: structured suit in modern corporate interior, calm confident posture, no clutter, premium tone.
Photoreal executive boardroom look: double-breasted tailoring, polished luxury atmosphere, strong leadership portrait, no text.
Photoreal wedding guest styling: warm cocoa tailored suit at elegant event venue, celebratory but refined mood, no crowd clutter.
Photoreal collection hero for boardroom edit: navy and charcoal formal styling, architectural office corridor backdrop, cinematic premium framing.
Photoreal collection hero for executive essentials: crisp ivory shirt and midnight tailoring, simple luxury interior, clean merchandising composition.
Photoreal collection hero for signature neutrals: espresso and warm ivory palette, soft luxury lighting, premium editorial finish.
Photoreal product hero for Midnight Commander Suit: full tailored look, neutral studio background, true fabric texture, ecommerce-ready framing.
Photoreal product hero for Ivory Broadcloth Shirt: sharp collar, premium cotton texture, clean studio background, catalog-grade lighting.

preview_set.slot_key: How to Style a Brown Suit Without Losing Formality
preview_set.prompt: Photoreal editorial image: refined brown suit styling scene with luxury city backdrop, magazine-grade composition, no text overlay.

preview_set.slot_key: Shirt and Tie Combinations That Always Look Expensive
preview_set.prompt: Photoreal editorial close-up: premium shirt and tie pairings on tailored jacket, rich textile detail, elegant magazine crop.

phase_2_product_variants: Generate detail and styled variants for all 8 core product SKUs (16 extra images).
Enforce consistent lighting per product family for carousel cohesion.
phase_3_lookbook_brand: Refresh lookbook set: Boardroom Quiet Luxury, Ceremony in Cocoa, Travel Day Precision.
Replace generic brand-landscape fallback with two dedicated brand atmosphere plates.
